summary: The session focused on tips for maintaining healthy teeth and gums, discussing the effectiveness of electric versus manual toothbrushes, and the use of mouthwash. The user sought specific recommendations for toothpaste and inquired about the necessity and frequency of mouthwash use.
facts: The user asked for easy and effective tips to maintain healthy teeth and gums. The user inquired whether to use an electric toothbrush or a manual one and asked about their effectiveness. The user requested recommendations for specific brands or types of toothpaste that are better for maintaining healthy teeth and gums. The user asked if it is necessary to rinse with mouthwash after brushing or if it can be used separately. The user wanted to know if it is okay to use mouthwash every day.
